arts.sum: Mohamed Salah isn’t getting his way at Liverpool right now. Salah is performing brilliantly on the pitch, but, for some reason, Liverpool still won’t offer...

arts.ttl: Arne Slot faces Brendan Rodgers Liverpool dilemma after Man City Champions League surrender
arts.sum: Liverpool face Real Madrid in the Champions League on Wednesday before host Manchester City in the Premier League this weekend

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Real Madrid LIVE: Possible lineups and latest updates
arts.sum: Liverpool vs Real Madrid kicks off at 20:00 local time in England - which makes it a 21:00 CET start for fans back in Spain. Real Madrid are heading to Northern England for an iconic European battle on Champions League Matchday 5, with Anfield and Liverpool set to play hosts to Los Blancos on Wednesday night.

arts.sum: Liverpool take on Real Madrid at Anfield tonight in the biggest game of the new-look Champions League group stage so far
